description: A planner must deconflict the transit route of a carrier strike group with commercial shipping lanes and a known submarine threat area.

nodes.task_description: Plot the desired route for the carrier strike group.

expected_outcome.value: Planner accurately inputs the intended path.

nodes.task_description: Overlay commercial shipping lane data and intelligence data on submarine threat areas.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a comprehensive map showing all constraints.

nodes.task_description: Adjust the strike group's route to avoid the highest-density shipping lanes and the submarine threat area.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a safer, deconflicted route for the naval force.
